info.name: HT-Cash-DA-CLM-adaptive-time-1-fix1
info.description:
HT v18 fix1 — $4M Pool · 1 CLM (Buy-and-Hold) · NO MIRROR · Derive Pattern

  FIX1 vs v1:
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  FIX: Added scf_deployments — BTC buy ($1M) + T-bill purchases ($988K) on Mar-01
       No sell without a buy. Cash outflows visible on Day 1.
  FIX: BTC sell proceeds now POSITIVE amountUSD (inflow), per ScheduledCashFlowModelData Javadoc.
       v1 had them negative (wrong sign).
  FIX: CLM MD payoff (final BTC liquidation) captured and routed to CASH-PAM.
  ADD: Portfolio composition at every epoch — BTC value, T-bill MtM, cash balance, percentages.
       All DERIVED from Phase 0 ACTUS events. Nothing hardcoded.
  ADD: 4 DERIVED Reference Indexes: HT_CASH_BALANCE, HT_BTC_VALUE, HT_TBILL_VALUE, HT_PORTFOLIO_DERIVED

  SIGN CONVENTION (ScheduledCashFlowModelData Javadoc):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    amountUSD > 0 : inflow  (T-Bill maturity, BTC sell proceeds, CLM maturity)
    amountUSD < 0 : outflow (BTC buy, T-Bill purchase)
    signal = amountUSD / abs(currentNP)
    POF_PP payoff = amountUSD (sign-correct)
    STF_PP NP: NP -= amountUSD
      inflow  → NP decreases (capital recovered)
      outflow → NP increases (capital deployed)

  CASH-PAM CASH FLOW WATERFALL:
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Feb-28: IED $4M (pool established)
  Mar-01: scf_deployments PP ≈ -$1,988K (BTC buy $1M + T-bills $988K)
  Apr-15→Aug-31: scf_btc_proceeds PP +$52K..+$200K (BTC sell proceeds)
  Jun-01: scf_tbill_flows PP +$400K (T-bill 3mo maturity)
  Jul-01: scf_tbill_flows PP +$350K (T-bill 4mo maturity)
  Aug-01: scf_tbill_flows PP +$250K (T-bill 5mo maturity)
  Aug-31: MD (final settlement)

  POOL SIZING (same as v17):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    NAV = $4,000,000. BTC = $1M (20 BTC @ $50K). T-Bills = $988,113. Cash = $2,011,887.

  RESEARCH REFERENCES:
  Nakamoto (2008): Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
  SEC SAB 121 (2022): Custodied Digital Assets
  FASB ASU 2023-08: Crypto Assets (fair value measurement)
  BIS Working Paper 1013: DeFi Lending (2022)
  OCC Interpretive Letter 1170: National Bank Digital Asset Authority
  Basel BCBS d545: Prudential Treatment of Cryptoasset Exposures
  CFA Institute (2024): Digital Asset Portfolio Management

  SCENARIO: ht_v18_4m_derive_v2_scn01  CONTRACTS: 5  ZERO CODE CHANGES.
